{{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Relic Casket|orange}} use to obtain random resources.

The drop rates are:
* 20.83% {{RewardIconWithText|Stone}}
* 20.83% {{RewardIconWithText|Wood}}
* 12.50% {{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}}
* 16.67% {{RewardIconWithText|Green Reagent|green}}
* 8.33% {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent|blue}}
* 4.17% {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Reagent|purple}}
* 13.89% {{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest|orange}}
* 2.08% {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad|orange}}
* 0.69% {{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin|orange}}

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
